name: Shrimp Scampi 2
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Large fresh shrimp, uncooked and cleaned
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the melted margarine, vegetable oil, minced garlic, and pepper in a shallow heatproof casserole dish.
2. Add the shrimp to the mixture and toss lightly to coat evenly.
3. Spread the shrimp in a single layer on the bottom of the dish.
4. Place the dish 4 inches from the heat source and broil for 3-4 minutes, turning the shrimp halfway through cooking time.
5. Continue broiling the shrimp for an additional 3-4 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. Sprinkle with chopped parsley and serve.
